rationale: Information geometry (mathematical statistics) is a genuinely different specific field from quantum algebra, so field_match fails. The stated mechanism denotes a dually-flat statistical manifold whose zero-curvature dual connections fix moments/cumulants, whereas the reference denotes a flat family of Frobenius algebras with a potential satisfying WDVV associativity and a structure-preserving tensor product; both are flat structures over a base but the defining machinery differs (dual connections/correlators vs. associative Frobenius multiplication/WDVV), so mechanism_match fails and the answer is not equivalent.
